creator: rs@bytecamp.net
text:
Created attachment 176247
patch for Makefile and pkg-plist

The following patch adds an option I18N which will install lumina with localisation support. This will be enabled by default. The port x11/lumina-i18n should become deprecated soon.

I also bumped PORTREVISION and fixed a possible typo in pkg-plist (double QT_LIBDIR).
